Metadata.SimplifiedName: Way of the Exploding Fist, The
Metadata.SourceFile: Way of the Exploding Fist The (Melbourne House).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC350 "THEWAYOFTHEEXPLODINGFIST-0334-C350" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0334 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Way of the Exploding Fist, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Moved some init code from $02D7 to $0334
